series_metadata.series_title: AS/400 System Documentation and Training Manuals
series_metadata.series_description: The AS/400 system documentation shows various tasks that can be performed by the systems/operations section of ISS for the monitoring, maintaining and performance of the AS/400. The AS/400 training manuals are created by ISS personnel and are given to users who attend training classes manual consists of many exercises and examples of operating procedures for the AS/400 applications.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: AS/400 system documentation and training manuals in computer room determined be no longer of administrative value
